title: Talking Tables Paper Honeycomb Christmas Tree Decorations - Pack of 3 Hanging Xmas Baubles in White, Green and Yellow, Small, Goldcreamwhite
features: Designed for a sophisticated Christmas Tree, these Honeycomb Baubles Tree Decorations by Talking Tables will add a touch of glamour to any room
EASY TO ASSEMBLE - These mini honeycomb decorations are easy to construct - simply unfold, use the magnets to secure and hang up using the attached string

OCCASION - In their unique honeycomb shapes, use as hanging Christmas Tree Decorations, hang from door handles or as Christmas table decorations dotted between our glass candle holder and string lights
SIZE - Made from high quality card, these Christmas baubles measures 8cm height and come in a pack of 3 mini honeycomb decorations
CHRISTMAS DECORATIONS - Shop our full range of honeycomb Christmas decorations, Secret Santa Gifts, Stocking Filler Ideas and more. These can be found in our Amazon store
description: Product Description Create that unmistakable feeling of Christmas togetherness with Talking Tables. Our festive tableware, candles, and garlands bring warmth and charm to every setting — transforming your dining room into a space that feels alive with laughter and love. From rustic napkins to holly-detailed crackers, every piece is designed to help you set a table that tells a story — one of family, comfort, and unforgettable moments shared around the table. Celebrate friendship, food, and laughter with Talking Tables. Our vibrant tableware, candles, and party crowns turn any meal into a moment worth remembering. Mix bold colours and playful touches for a festive setup that feels spontaneous, stylish, and full of joy. Whether it’s Friendsmas or just a reason to gather, Talking Tables helps you create a table that sparks laughter, connection, and stories that last long after the glasses are empty.
